title: Brabantia - Foldable Laundry Basket 40L - Water Resistant Hamper for Wet & Dry Laundry - Storage Basket for Clothes & Linen - Bamboo Rim for Easy Grip - Garment Washing - Home Accessory - Pepper Black
features: Compact & Spacious - This 40L foldable laundry basket expertly combines convenience and capacity, easily holding a full machine load of laundry while folding flat for effortless storage
Convenient Design - Features a bamboo rim for good grip with two hands or for placing it on your hip. Its robust build can comfortably carry up to 25 kg, ensuring reliability in everyday use

Multifunctional - Ideal for both wet and dry laundry with a special water-resistant coating, this basket is also perfect as a multifunctional storage solution for toys or paper products measuring 36 cm x 54 cm x 26.5 cm

Stylish & Practical - With it's sleek Pepper Black design, the Brabantia 40L Laundry Basket is not only space-efficient but also adds a touch of elegance to your home, blending functionality with style
High-Quality Assurance - Rest easy knowing that this Brabantia product adheres to high-quality standards. We back it with a 2-year guarantee and service for any unexpected issues
description: From the manufacturer Foldable Laundry Basket, 40L This Brabantia Foldable Laundry Basket can hold a machine load of wet or dry laundry, but takes up hardly any space itself. It folds flat in a second, is easy to clean and can also be used as a storage box for paper, or toys. Foldable and lovable! Product information Dimensions: W54 x D36 x H26,5 cm Color: Pepper Black 40 litre About Brabantia Beautifully designed quality products Designing sustainability into our products Official B Corp certification from 2023 Key features. Special water resistant coating. Carry maximum 25 kg. Good grip - bamboo rim Large volume Room for a complete machine load of washing. Easy and compact storage. Folds flat in a second.
